recommendations.title: Maléfique
recommendations.overview: Four prisoners discover a handwritten book of black magic in their cell, and decide to use it to escape.

recommendations.title: The Substance
recommendations.overview: A fading celebrity decides to use a black market drug, a cell-replicating substance that temporarily creates a younger, better version of herself.

recommendations.title: November
recommendations.overview: In a poor Estonian village, a group of peasants use magic and folk remedies to survive the winter, and a young woman tries to get a young man to love her.

recommendations.title: Art of the Devil 2
recommendations.overview: A beautiful teacher is wronged by six of her students. Calling on demons and forces of black magic, she extracts an ultra-gruesome retribution against each of them.
recommendations.director: Yossapong Phonsup, Kongkiat Khomsiri, Pasith Buranajan, Putipong Saisikaew, Isara Nadee, Art Thamthrakul, Seree Phongnithi

recommendations.title: Theatre of Blood
recommendations.overview: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition.

recommendations.title: Encanto
recommendations.overview: The tale of an extraordinary family, the Madrigals, who live hidden in the mountains of Colombia, in a magical house, in a vibrant town, in a wondrous, charmed place called an Encanto. The magic of the Encanto has blessed every child in the family—ev

recommendations.title: Martyrs
recommendations.overview: A young woman’s quest for revenge against the people who kidnapped and tortured her as a child leads her and her best friend, also a victim of child abuse, on a terrifying journey into a living hell of depravity.

recommendations.title: Deathgasm
recommendations.overview: Two teenage boys unwittingly summon an ancient evil entity known as The Blind One by delving into black magic while trying to escape their mundane lives.

recommendations.title: Dark Spell
recommendations.overview: Terror strikes when a heartbroken woman uses black magic to get her husband back.

recommendations.title: Night Shift
recommendations.overview: A young nurse with a domestic abuse past starts working the night shift at a small hospital, where, during the night, the ghost of a nurse materializes.
